statement: In every magma, Equation 2397 (`x = (y * (z * (y * w))) * u`) implies Equation 1212 (`x = y * ((z * (w * w)) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0413
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op y w))) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w w)) x))
